Admin._comment: Only these emails may sign in. Empty = no one (fail closed). SuperAdminEmails additionally see cross-tenant pages.

Dashboard._comment: Public base URL of the redirect site, used to render full short URLs. Empty = show the bare code.

Resend._comment: ApiKey comes from user-secrets (Resend:ApiKey). FromAddress must be a Resend-verified domain in prod; onboarding@resend.dev delivers only to your own account email for local testing.
